## Community Link Submission

### Link details

- **Title**: ___
- **URL**: ___

### Checklist

- [ ] Entry in `community/links.yaml` follows the schema (`title`, `url`, `tags`, `description`, `submittedBy`, `submittedAt`)
- [ ] URL resolves and returns a successful HTTP response
- [ ] Target repository is archgate-compatible (has `archgate-pack.yaml` or ADR+rules pairs)
- [ ] Entry is not a duplicate of an existing link
- [ ] No YAML syntax errors
